reasoning: John Morgan has a history of teasing runs for Florida governor (e.g., in 2018 and 2022) to generate media attention but ultimately deciding not to run. Even if he does decide to run, there is no pressing deadline to announce before July 1, 2025 (the election is in November 2026, and the primary/qualifying deadlines are mid-2026). Without the need to show first-quarter or second-quarter grassroots fundraising momentum (as he can easily self-fund), there is little structural incentive to announce this early. Given the short timeframe of just 24 days left in the forecasting window (June 6 to July 1) and his track record of deciding against running, the probability of an announcement in this specific window is quite low.
